name: tree-view
author: lumine-code
description: Enhanced tree view for exploring and opening project files in Lumine
backgroundTips: You can toggle the Tree View with {atom-workspace>tree-view:toggle}
You can focus the Tree View with {atom-workspace>tree-view:toggle-focus}

tree-view.description: A tree-like view of directories and files
Extended tree view API with reveal and navigation support

tree-view-roots.description: Register virtual root sections in the tree view

sortMethod.title: Sort Method
sortMethod.description: Method used to sort files and directories in the tree view.

sortFoldersBeforeFiles.title: Sort Folders Before Files
sortFoldersBeforeFiles.description: When listing directory items, list subdirectories before listing files.

sortByBase.title: Sort By Base
sortByBase.description: Sort by filename base and extension independently. Files with the same base name are grouped together.

duplicateCopyNameStyle.title: Duplicate Copy Name Style
duplicateCopyNameStyle.description: Naming style used when copy-pasting an entry where an item with the same name already exists.

enum.description: System default (Windows, macOS, or Linux style)
Windows style: file - Copy.txt, file - Copy (2).txt
macOS style: file copy.txt, file copy 2.txt

showOnRightSide.title: Show On Right Side
showOnRightSide.description: Show the tree view on the right side of the workspace.

squashDirectoryNames.title: Collapse directories
squashDirectoryNames.description: Collapse directories that only contain a single directory.

hideVcsIgnoredFiles.title: Hide VCS Ignored Files
hideVcsIgnoredFiles.description: Don't show files and directories ignored by the current project's VCS system. For example, projects using Git have these paths defined in their `.gitignore` file.

hideIgnoredNames.title: Hide Ignored Names
hideIgnoredNames.description: Don't show items matched by the `Ignored Names` core config setting.

autoReveal.title: Auto Reveal
autoReveal.description: Reveal tree view entries when they become the active pane item.

focusOnReveal.title: Focus On Reveal
focusOnReveal.description: Focus the tree view when revealing entries.

alwaysOpenExisting.title: Always Open Existing
alwaysOpenExisting.description: When opening a file, always focus an already-existing view of the file even if it's in another pane.

hiddenOnStartup.title: Hidden On Startup
hiddenOnStartup.description: When Lumine is opened, the view is hidden.

fileDoubleClick.title: File Double Click
fileDoubleClick.description: Require double click to open files. When enabled, single click only selects the entry.

dirDoubleClick.title: Dir Double Click
dirDoubleClick.description: Require double click to expand/collapse folders. When enabled, single click only selects the entry. The arrow icon always responds to a single click.
